title: The Decided Chamber

features.name: the-foreknown-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: A plaque etched with symbols of your own choices, in a language you shouldn't understand. The decision looks back at you.

features.name: the-already-stacked
features.desc-on-touch: A tower of cards marked with choice-points. Every card is in place. None are falling.

features.name: the-mirror-pool
features.desc-on-touch: Water reflecting not this room, but the decision you were always going to make. Clearer than reality.

features.name: the-branching-arch
features.desc-on-touch: Two doorways framed as one. Both lead to the same place. Both always did.

features.name: the-settling-compass
features.desc-on-touch: A needle spinning through all directions at once, settling on whichever way you were always facing.

inscription: every choice was already decided before you learned to choose; the chamber preserves the moment you discovered this.

file.name: Decisions_Predated_Registry.txt
file.note: a ledger of choices, each dated before you made them, annotated with what you did anyway

exits.label: further up where decisions stop changing
into the archive's own predetermined choice

reverie.title: REVERIE — where the decision was already hers
narr: You sit at the table where she stopped talking.
Katita decided weeks ago. You see it in how her
finger traces the cup's rim—a goodbye rehearsed.
She met your eyes with the mercy of someone who
always knew. The choice was always hers to make,
and you were brave enough only now to accept it.
